Name: i18n-system
Pitfall: Add all 3 languages (en/zh/ja) for every new key; store preference in localStorage
Keywords: i18n translation language multi-language t function

Name: i18n-data-attr
Pitfall: Call applyTranslations() after language switch and after DOM updates; use data-i18n-placeholder for inputs
Keywords: i18n data attribute html translate placeholder

Name: escape-html
Pitfall: ALWAYS use escapeHtml for textContent and escapeAttr for attributes with user content
Keywords: xss escape html attribute security sanitize user content

Name: localstorage-history
Pitfall: Cap at 30 items to prevent localStorage bloat; deduplicate by ID before adding
Keywords: localstorage history array save load max items

Name: localstorage-settings
Pitfall: Use consistent key prefix (app-*); provide sensible defaults for every setting
Keywords: localstorage settings persist save load preferences

Name: dom-ref-cache
Pitfall: Cache once at file top; never re-query by ID in loops or event handlers

Name: data-attr-events
Pattern: Use data attributes + addEventListener for dynamic content
Pitfall: NEVER use inline onclick with dynamic content; data-* + event delegation avoids escaping issues
Keywords: event listener data attribute onclick delegate dynamic content

Name: async-button-disable
Pitfall: Always re-enable in finally block; update button text to show loading state
Keywords: button disable async loading prevent double click

Name: blob-url-management
Pattern: Create and revoke Blob URLs properly
Pitfall: Always revoke old Blob URLs to prevent memory leaks; track previous URL in variable
Keywords: blob url create revoke memory leak object

Name: hidden-class-toggle
Pitfall: Use !important to override other display rules; prefer classList over style.display
Keywords: hidden class toggle visibility show hide display

Name: fetch-wrapper
Pattern: Standard fetch wrapper with error handling
Pitfall: Always check res.ok; handle network errors separately; return null on failure for easy checks
Keywords: fetch api post json error handling wrapper

Name: show-error
Pitfall: Auto-hide after duration; use 0 for persistent errors; always show translated messages
Keywords: error display show message notification toast

Name: dark-theme-tokens
Pitfall: Always use token variables not hardcoded hex values; keep consistent across components
Keywords: dark theme css tokens variables colors border radius

Name: css-transitions
Pitfall: 0.15s for hover / 0.2s for buttons / 0.3s for progress; always respect prefers-reduced-motion
Keywords: css transition duration hover animation reduced motion

Name: responsive-breakpoint
Pitfall: 1024px is main breakpoint for 3-col → 1-col; test at 375px (iPhone SE) minimum
Keywords: responsive breakpoint mobile tablet desktop grid column

Name: folder-picker-frontend
Pitfall: Show current folder in disabled input; save choice to localStorage immediately
Keywords: folder picker browse frontend backend integration

Name: eventsource-client
Pitfall: Always close EventSource on terminal status or error; handle onerror for connection drops
Keywords: eventsource sse client progress streaming close

Name: debounce-input
Pitfall: 500ms for search/subtitle; 300ms for autocomplete; 100ms for UI updates
Keywords: debounce input delay throttle search performance

Name: keyboard-shortcuts
Pitfall: Check for input/textarea focus to avoid conflicting with typing; use e.preventDefault()
Keywords: keyboard shortcut hotkey ctrl enter escape global
